zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville於1226年出生在法國洛萊姆斯瓦庫勒爾斯時，他的父親Simon de Joinville I51歲，母親Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne35歲。他於1244年3月15日與Maud de Lacy結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆特利姆被列為lord of trim。他去世於1314年10月21日在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆享年88歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville于1226年出生在法国洛萊姆斯瓦庫勒爾斯时，他的父亲Simon de Joinville I51岁，母亲Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne35岁。他于1244年3月15日与Maud de Lacy结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆特利姆被列为lord of trim。他去世于1314年10月21日在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆享年88岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville was born in 1226, in Vaucouleurs, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Simon de Joinville I, was 51 and his mother, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, was 35. He married Maud de Lacy on 15 March 1244. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as lord of trim in Trim, Trim, County Meath, Ireland. He died on 21 October 1314, in Trim, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 88, and was buried in Trim, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville est né en 1226, à Vaucouleurs, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Simon de Joinville I, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Lacy le 15 mars 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of trim à Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irlande. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1314, à Trim, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterré à Trim, County Meath, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville 1226 in Vaucouleurs, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Joinville I 51 und seine Mutter Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne 35. Er hat am 15. März 1244 Maud de Lacy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als lord of trim in Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irland aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. Oktober 1314 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Trim, County Meath, Irland und wurde in Trim, County Meath, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville è nato il nel 1226 nel Vaucouleurs, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Simon de Joinville I, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Lacy il 15 marzo 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of trim nel Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Morì il 21 ottobre 1314, nel Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolto a Trim, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Genevilleが1226年にフランスロレィヌメウゼヴァウコウレウルズで生まれた時，父Simon de Joinville Iは51歳，母Countess Béatrix d'Auxonneは35歳であった。1244年3月15日にMaud de Lacyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。アイルランドコウントイ メアストリムトリムでの職業はlord of trimと記録されている。彼は1314年10月21日にアイルランドコウントイ メアストリムで88歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ メアストリムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville(이)가 1226년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바콜우르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Joinville I(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1244년 3월 15일 Maud de Lacy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림 트림에서 lord of trim이었다. 그는 1314년 10월 21일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville nasceu em 1226, em Vaucouleurs, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Simon de Joinville I, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Lacy em 15 de março de 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como lord of trim em Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1314, em Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Trim, County Meath, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville родился в 1226 г. в местности ваукоулеурс, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Simon de Joinville I было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Lacy 15 марта 1244 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии lord of trim в местности трим, трим, коунти мит, Ирландия. Он умер 21 октября 1314 г. в местности трим, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности трим, коунти мит, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Geneville 1st Baron Geneville nació en 1226, en Vaucouleurs, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Simon de Joinville I, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Countess Béatrix d'Auxonne, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Maud de Lacy el 15 de marzo de 1244. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era lord of trim en Trim, Trim, County Meath, Irlanda. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1314, en Trim, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultado en Trim, County Meath, Irlanda.
